description_fr: Steve Jobs, iPhone, Mac, iPod. L'histoire d'Apple en 15 questions.
description_en: Steve Jobs, iPhone, Mac, iPod. The Apple story in 15 questions.

questions.question_fr: En quelle année Apple a-t-elle été fondée ?
questions.question_en: In what year was Apple founded?
questions.explanation_fr: Apple Computer Company a été fondée le 1er avril 1976.
questions.explanation_en: Apple Computer Company was founded on April 1, 1976.

questions.question_en: How many founders did Apple have?
questions.explanation_fr: Steve Jobs, Steve Wozniak et Ronald Wayne (qui a vendu ses parts pour 800$).
questions.explanation_en: Steve Jobs, Steve Wozniak, and Ronald Wayne (who sold his shares for $800).

questions.question_fr: Le premier iPhone est sorti en 2007.
questions.question_en: The first iPhone was released in 2007.
questions.explanation_fr: Steve Jobs a présenté l'iPhone le 9 janvier 2007. Sortie le 29 juin 2007.
questions.explanation_en: Steve Jobs unveiled iPhone on January 9, 2007. Released June 29, 2007.

questions.question_fr: Quel est le nom de l'assistant vocal d'Apple ?
questions.question_en: What is the name of Apple's voice assistant?
questions.explanation_fr: Siri (Speech Interpretation and Recognition Interface), introduit en 2011 sur l'iPhone 4S.
questions.explanation_en: Siri (Speech Interpretation and Recognition Interface), introduced in 2011 on iPhone 4S.

questions.explanation_fr: Tim Cook a succédé à Steve Jobs en août 2011.
questions.explanation_en: Tim Cook succeeded Steve Jobs in August 2011.

questions.question_fr: Le premier ordinateur Apple grand public s'appelait l'Apple ___.
questions.question_en: Apple's first mass-market computer was called the Apple ___.
questions.explanation_fr: L'Apple II (1977) a popularisé l'ordinateur personnel grand public.
questions.explanation_en: The Apple II (1977) popularized the personal computer for the mass market.

questions.question_fr: En quelle année Steve Jobs a-t-il été renvoyé d'Apple ?
questions.question_en: In what year was Steve Jobs fired from Apple?
questions.explanation_fr: Jobs a quitté Apple en 1985 après un conflit avec John Sculley. Il est revenu en 1997.
questions.explanation_en: Jobs left Apple in 1985 after a conflict with John Sculley. He returned in 1997.

questions.question_fr: Apple est la première entreprise au monde à avoir atteint 3 trillions de dollars de capitalisation.
questions.question_en: Apple was the first company to reach $3 trillion market cap.
questions.explanation_fr: Apple a passé les 3 000 milliards de dollars de capitalisation en janvier 2022.
questions.explanation_en: Apple crossed $3 trillion market cap in January 2022.

questions.question_fr: Quel produit Apple a été lancé en 2001 et a révolutionné la musique ?
questions.question_en: Which Apple product launched in 2001 revolutionized music?
questions.explanation_fr: L'iPod (octobre 2001) avec son slogan '1000 chansons dans votre poche'.
questions.explanation_en: The iPod (October 2001) with its slogan '1,000 songs in your pocket'.

questions.question_fr: Quel est le siège mondial d'Apple appelé ?
questions.question_en: What is Apple's global HQ called?
questions.explanation_fr: Apple Park (campus circulaire, le 'spaceship') a ouvert en 2017 à Cupertino.
questions.explanation_en: Apple Park (circular 'spaceship' campus) opened in 2017 in Cupertino.

questions.question_fr: Le nouveau casque de réalité mixte d'Apple s'appelle Apple Vision ___.
questions.question_en: Apple's new mixed reality headset is called Apple Vision ___.
questions.explanation_fr: Apple Vision Pro lancé en février 2024 à 3 499$.
questions.explanation_en: Apple Vision Pro launched in February 2024 at $3,499.

questions.question_fr: Le logo Apple a déjà été un arc-en-ciel.
questions.question_en: The Apple logo was once a rainbow.
questions.explanation_fr: Le logo Apple était arc-en-ciel de 1977 à 1998 (changement par Steve Jobs).
questions.explanation_en: The Apple logo was rainbow from 1977 to 1998 (changed by Steve Jobs).

questions.question_fr: Combien d'iPhone Apple vend-elle environ par an ?
questions.question_en: About how many iPhones does Apple sell per year?
questions.explanation_fr: Apple vend environ 230 millions d'iPhones par an.
questions.explanation_en: Apple sells about 230 million iPhones per year.

questions.explanation_fr: Le M1 est le 1er processeur Apple Silicon, remplaçant les puces Intel sur Mac.
questions.explanation_en: M1 is Apple's 1st Apple Silicon processor, replacing Intel chips on Macs.

questions.question_fr: L'application de musique Apple s'appelle Apple ___.
questions.question_en: Apple's music streaming service is called Apple ___.
questions.explanation_fr: Apple Music, lancé en 2015 pour rivaliser avec Spotify.
questions.explanation_en: Apple Music, launched in 2015 to compete with Spotify.
